title: Submit a complete business inquiry
description: A visitor can complete the contact form with required details and receive a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the business name field with a valid business name
Fill in the business type field with a valid business type
Select at least one required service
Fill in the goals field with a valid project goal
Submit the form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Navigate through the main site pages from the header
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the header navigation to move across the core site pages and reach the contact page from anywhere on the site.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the header link to view the services page
Verify the services page is displayed
Click the header link to view the portfolio page
Verify the portfolio page is displayed
Click the header link to view the how it works page
Verify the how it works page is displayed
Click the header link to view the pricing page
Verify the pricing page is displayed
Click the header link to view the about page
Verify the about page is displayed
Click the header link to view the contact page
Verify the contact page is displayed

title: Submit a business inquiry from the homepage CTA
description: This verifies that a visitor can move from the homepage into contact lead generation and successfully submit the required inquiry form.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a homepage call to action that leads to the contact page
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the message field with a business inquiry
Select a service from the service options
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Show validation when required contact fields are missing
description: This verifies that the contact form blocks submission when required information is omitted and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Submit the contact form without filling required fields
Verify validation errors are visible
Verify the form is not submitted

title: Show validation when a required field is missing
description: A visitor gets a validation error when submitting the contact form without completing a required field.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Leave one required field empty
Select at least one required service
Fill in the goals field with a valid project goal
Submit the form
Verify a validation error is visible

title: Show validation for an invalid email address
description: A visitor gets an email validation error when the contact form is submitted with an invalid email format.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with an invalid email address
Fill in the business name field with a valid business name
Fill in the business type field with a valid business type
Select at least one required service
Fill in the goals field with a valid project goal
Submit the form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Reach key pages from the footer navigation
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the footer navigation to reach linked destination pages from the homepage.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the footer link to view the services page
Verify the services page is displayed
Navigate back to /
Scroll to the footer
Click the footer link to view the portfolio page
Verify the portfolio page is displayed

title: Show validation for an invalid contact email
description: This verifies that the contact form rejects an invalid email address and displays email validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with an invalid email address
Fill in the message field with a business inquiry
Select a service from the service options
Submit the contact form
Verify an email validation error is visible
Verify the form is not submitted

title: Submit a portfolio inquiry from the portfolio page
description: This verifies that a visitor can request follow-up from the portfolio page and receive a success confirmation after submitting the inquiry form.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the message field with a portfolio inquiry
Submit the portfolio inquiry form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Reach the contact form from the homepage CTA
description: A visitor can start on the homepage and use the call to action to reach the contact page for lead generation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call to action to contact the team
Verify the contact page is displayed

title: Show validation on a partially completed contact form
description: This verifies that partially completed contact submissions still surface required-field validation before the form can be sent.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Submit the contact form
Verify required-field validation errors are visible
Verify the form is not submitted

title: Browse services and filter the list by category
description: This verifies that a visitor can review services, narrow them by category, and see the filtered results update.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Select a service category filter
Verify the filtered service list is displayed
Verify service cards remain visible

title: Submit a portfolio inquiry successfully
description: A visitor can enter an email address in the portfolio inquiry form and receive a success confirmation after submitting.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Enter a valid email address into the inquiry form
Submit the inquiry form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: View portfolio campaigns and filter by category
description: This verifies that a visitor can browse portfolio examples and narrow the visible campaigns by category.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Select a portfolio category filter
Verify the filtered campaign list is displayed
Verify campaign cards are visible

title: Compare pricing options and continue to contact
description: This verifies that a visitor can review pricing information and follow a call to action into the contact flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /pricing
Verify pricing cards are displayed
Verify the free-features section is displayed
Click a pricing page call to action that leads to the contact page
Verify the contact page is displayed

title: Browse portfolio campaigns by category
description: A visitor can open the portfolio page, narrow campaign examples with a category filter, and see the filtered items update.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Verify campaign cards are displayed
Select a campaign category filter
Verify the displayed portfolio items update to match the selected category

title: Review the homepage value proposition and trust signals
description: A visitor can scan the homepage hero, trust indicators, and service highlights to understand the offering.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Review the hero section
Scroll to the trust indicators and service highlights
Verify the value proposition and supporting content are displayed

title: Review the homepage hero trust and service sections
description: This verifies that the homepage presents the core value proposition, trust indicators, service highlights, and a clear route onward.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero section is displayed
Verify trust indicators and service highlights are displayed

title: Reach the contact form from the services page CTA
description: A visitor can review services and use the page call to action to open the contact page.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click the call to action to request a quote or consultation
Verify the contact page is displayed

title: Use services page CTA to continue to contact
description: This verifies that a visitor evaluating services can click through to the contact destination to request follow-up.

steps.description: Navigate to /services
Click a services page call to action that leads to the contact page
Verify the contact page is displayed
Verify the contact form is visible

title: Review the how-it-works process and FAQ interaction
description: A visitor can review the five-step process and expand then collapse a FAQ item on the how-it-works page.

steps.description: Navigate to /how-it-works
Verify the five-step process overview is displayed
Expand a FAQ item
Verify the FAQ answer is displayed
Collapse the same FAQ item
Verify the FAQ answer is hidden

title: Compare pricing cards and free features
description: A visitor can review pricing options and the free features section on the pricing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /pricing
Verify pricing cards are displayed
Verify the free features section is displayed

title: Evaluate the process overview and FAQs on how it works
description: This verifies that a visitor can review the five-step process and expand the FAQs to understand how the service works.

steps.description: Navigate to /how-it-works
Verify the five-step process is displayed
Expand a frequently asked question
Verify the FAQ answer is displayed

title: Use pricing CTA to open contact destination
description: A visitor can move from the pricing page into the contact destination through the page call to action.

steps.description: Navigate to /pricing
Click the call to action that leads to contact
Verify the contact page is displayed

title: Review the full how-it-works process and FAQs
description: A visitor can read the five-step process and expand FAQ answers before moving on to contact.

steps.description: Navigate to /how-it-works
Review the process steps
Expand an FAQ item
Verify the process overview is displayed and the expanded FAQ answer is visible

title: Move from how it works into lead generation
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the how it works page call to action to reach the contact form and begin an inquiry.

steps.description: Navigate to /how-it-works
Click a how it works page call to action that leads to the contact page
Verify the contact page is displayed
Verify the contact form is visible

title: Use how-it-works CTA to open contact destination
description: A visitor can move from the how-it-works page into the contact destination through the page call to action.

steps.description: Navigate to /how-it-works
Click the call to action that leads to contact
Verify the contact page is displayed

title: Use the how-it-works CTA to start an inquiry
description: A visitor can move from the process overview into the contact page using the page call to action.

steps.description: Navigate to /how-it-works
Click the call to action to start a project
Verify the contact page is displayed

title: Submit the portfolio inquiry email form
description: A visitor can submit the portfolio inquiry form and receive a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Fill in the inquiry email field with a valid email address
Submit the portfolio inquiry form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Review the about page story and industries served
description: This verifies that a visitor can learn the company mission, story, and industries served from the about page.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Verify the mission and story content is displayed
Verify the industries served and process overview are displayed

title: Show email validation on portfolio inquiry form
description: A visitor sees validation feedback when submitting the portfolio inquiry form with an invalid email address.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Enter an invalid email address into the inquiry form
Submit the inquiry form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Handle empty portfolio email submission
description: A visitor sees validation feedback when submitting the portfolio inquiry form without providing an email address.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Submit the inquiry form without entering an email address
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Show validation for an invalid portfolio inquiry email
description: A visitor gets an email validation error when submitting the portfolio inquiry form with an invalid address.

steps.description: Navigate to /portfolio
Fill in the inquiry email field with an invalid email address
Submit the portfolio inquiry form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Handle FAQ toggles without losing the open answer
description: This verifies that repeatedly expanding and collapsing an FAQ leaves the answer visibility in a stable state for the visitor.

steps.description: Navigate to /how-it-works
Expand a frequently asked question
Collapse the same frequently asked question
Expand the same frequently asked question again
Verify the FAQ answer is displayed
